en: I just, I need to know that it's possible
that two people can stay happy together forever.
No, it's not easy, that's for sure.
And I don't have the best track record in the world, I know, but I've been with your stepmother
for 10 years now, and I'm proud to say we're very happy.
Look, in my opinion, the best thing you can do
is find a person who loves you for exactly what you are.
Good mood, bad mood, ugly, pretty, handsome, what have you.
The right person's still gonna think the sun shines out your ass.
That's the kind of person that's worth sticking with.
